heavy_smoke_policy: This public summary is generated from existing local evidence only. It does not run scripts/finalAcceptanceCheck.sh, scripts/ciSmoke.sh, full pytest, market refresh, broker connections, orders, payments, or holdings writes.
safety_boundary: GitHub-safe sanitized summary. Raw local evidence, screenshots, browser paths, PIDs, absolute project paths, private data, and runtime logs stay local and gitignored.
next_action: Use this summary for GitHub handoff. Refresh raw local runtime/UI evidence first if macOS behavior changes, then regenerate this public summary.
